summary: Iteration 100: Testing Preview Board Feature for Directed Studio Mode. All 17 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend loads correctly, login works, DirectedStudio accessible via Marketing > AI Studio > Estúdio. New endpoints (POST /api/studio/projects/{id}/generate-preview, GET /api/studio/projects/{id}/preview) work correctly. Helper functions (_analyze_avatars_with_vision, _build_production_design, _create_composite_avatar, _generate_preview_task) are importable. Pipeline v5 skip logic verified.
critical_code_review_comments: studio.py: New POST /api/studio/projects/{id}/generate-preview endpoint (line 1672) starts background pre-production preview generation
studio.py: New GET /api/studio/projects/{id}/preview endpoint (line 1691) returns preview_status, production_design, avatar_descriptions
studio.py: _generate_preview_task (line 1607) runs avatar analysis + production design in background thread
studio.py: _run_multi_scene_production (line 871-879) checks for existing production_design and skips pre-production if already done via Preview Board

PreviewBoard.jsx: NEW component with data-testid attributes for all sections (preview-board, preview-style-anchors, preview-color-palette, preview-characters, preview-locations, preview-scene-flow, preview-music-plan, preview-voice-plan, preview-actions, preview-approve-btn, preview-regenerate-btn)
DirectedStudio.jsx: Added previewData/previewLoading/showPreview state, generatePreview() and approveAndProduce() functions
DirectedStudio.jsx: Step 2 has 3-button layout (Script, Preview Design, Produce) with data-testid attributes (preview-production-btn, start-production-btn)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Preview Board feature implemented. Key flows: (1) POST /api/studio/projects/{id}/generate-preview starts background pre-production (avatar analysis + production design), (2) GET /api/studio/projects/{id}/preview returns preview_status and production_design data, (3) DirectedStudio Step 2 shows Preview Design button alongside Start Production button, (4) PreviewBoard component renders production design visually with character bible, locations, scene flow, music plan, voice plan. Note: AI API calls require real API keys (Claude, Sora 2) - cannot test actual generation without valid keys. Frontend navigation: Marketing > Criar com AI Studio > Estúdio (campaign type).

frontend_ui_tests.Landing page load: PASS - AgentZZ landing page loads correctly
frontend_ui_tests.Login flow: PASS - Login with test credentials works
frontend_ui_tests.AI Studio access: PASS - Criar com AI Studio button works

code_verification.PreviewBoard data-testid attributes: PASS - All required data-testid attributes present (preview-board, preview-style-anchors, preview-color-palette, preview-characters, preview-locations, preview-scene-flow, preview-music-plan, preview-voice-plan, preview-actions, preview-approve-btn, preview-regenerate-btn)
code_verification.DirectedStudio Preview button: PASS - Preview Design button has data-testid=preview-production-btn
code_verification.DirectedStudio Production button: PASS - Start Production button has data-testid=start-production-btn
code_verification.Pipeline v5 skip logic: PASS - _run_multi_scene_production checks existing_pd and skips pre-production if already done

frontend_integration.generatePreview(): Calls POST /generate-preview, polls GET /preview until complete
frontend_integration.PreviewBoard component: Renders production design with expandable sections

preview_board_verification.pipeline_skip_logic: If existing_pd exists with character_bible, skips pre-production phase
